title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules derived from Anthropic founders' public statements for deciding what to build with Claude, aimed at helping builders avoid developing the wrong products. The video breaks down decision-making frameworks allegedly used by Dario and Daniela Amodei when prioritizing Claude development efforts.
